channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
✨ So cool!!!
Our official Vibe Jam sponsor @heyglif's founder Fabian made a tutorial how to create ...
item.description:
✨ So cool!!!
Our official Vibe Jam sponsor @heyglif's founder Fabian made a tutorial how to create cool video trailers for your game with his app Glif
And he made a cool video for my drone game to show how it works
He's also giving out free credits you can use to make your own videos on Glif (see the quote tweet how)
Really nice because even after the Vibe Jam ends, you worked on a game for a month, so you could actually try commercialize and market it with this
In last year's Vibe Jam @NicolaManzini made VibeSail, which started as a fun boat game, but a year later evolved into a realistic web-based sailing boat simulators, used by people to teach real sailing techniques!
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 0
item.author: @levelsio

item.title: At some point over the past century or so modern economy, especially in America, started tilting fro...
item.author: @tunguz

item.title: We push Prefill/Decode disaggregation beyond a single cluster: cross-datacenter + heterogeneous hard...
item.description:
We push Prefill/Decode disaggregation beyond a single cluster: cross-datacenter + heterogeneous hardware, unlocking the potential for significantly lower cost per token.
This was previously blocked by KV cache transfer overhead. The key enabler is our hybrid model (Kimi Linear), which reduces KV cache size and makes cross-DC PD practical.
Validated on a 20x scaled-up Kimi Linear model: ✅ 1.54× throughput ✅ 64% ↓ P90 TTFT → Directly translating into lower token cost.
More in Prefill-as-a-Service: https://t.co/If8fA3t9Og
--- @Kimi_Moonshot | ❤️ 50 | 🔁 9 | 💬 4 | 👁 1166
item.author: @Kimi_Moonshot
